<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Face representing a bitter reaction -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="200" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#000" stroke-width="8" />
  
  <!-- Eyes squeezed shut -->
  <path d="M160 220 L210 240 M160 240 L210 220" stroke="#000" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" />
  <path d="M302 220 L352 240 M302 240 L352 220" stroke="#000" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" />
  
  <!-- Squiggly, puckered mouth -->
  <path d="M200 360 Q220 330 256 360 T312 360" stroke="#000" stroke-width="12" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
  
  <!-- Bitter lemon slice -->
  <circle cx="400" cy="400" r="60" fill="#FFF700" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4" />
  <line x1="400" y1="340" x2="400" y2="460" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" />
  <line x1="340" y1="400" x2="460" y2="400" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" />
  <line x1="357" y1="357" x2="443" y2="443" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" />
  <line x1="357" y1="443" x2="443" y2="357" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" />

  <!-- Bitter coffee/dark liquid cup -->
  <path d="M80 350 L140 350 L130 440 L90 440 Z" fill="#3B2F2F" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4" />
  <path d="M140 370 Q160 370 160 390 T140 410" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4" />
</svg>
